d="M3 6l0 13"></path><path d="M12 6l0 13"></path><path d="M21 6l0 13"></path></svg>Description</h2><div class="prose prose-slate dark:prose-invert max-w-none section-overview"><div class="markdown-content  "><h1 id="langchainlanggraph-sdk"><code>@langchain/langgraph-sdk</code></h1>
<p>The JavaScript / TypeScript SDK for talking to a LangGraph API server.
Use it to create and manage assistants, threads, runs, cron
schedules, and the KV store — and, most importantly, to <strong>stream</strong>
graph executions in real time.</p>
<p>📚 <strong><a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/README.md">Full documentation</a></strong></p>
<h2 id="install">Install</h2>
<pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="background-color:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e;color:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8" tabindex="0"><code><span class="line"><span style="color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">pnpm</span><span style="color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> add</span><span style="color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> @langchain/langgraph-sdk</span><span style="color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> @langchain/core</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D"># or: npm install @langchain/langgraph-sdk @langchain/core</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D"># or: yarn add @langchain/langgraph-sdk @langchain/core</span></span></code></pre>
<h2 id="quick-start">Quick start</h2>
<pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="background-color:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e;color:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8" tabindex="0"><code><span class="line"><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">import</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> { Client } </span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">from</span><span style="color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF"> "@langchain/langgraph-sdk"</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">;</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">const</span><span style="color:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> client</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583"> new</span><span style="color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> Client</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">({ apiUrl: </span><span style="color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">"http://localhost:2024"</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D">// Open a thread-centric stream (the recommended way to stream).</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">const</span><span style="color:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> thread</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> client.threads.</span><span style="color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">stream</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">({ assistantId: </span><span style="color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">"my-agent"</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">await</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> thread.run.</span><span style="color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">start</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">({</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  input: { messages: [{ role: </span><span style="color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">"user"</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">, content: </span><span style="color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">"hello"</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> }] },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">for</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583"> await</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> (</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">const</span><span style="color:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> message</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583"> of</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> thread.messages) {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">  for</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583"> await</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> (</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">const</span><span style="color:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> token</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583"> of</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> message.text) {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">    process.stdout.</span><span style="color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">write</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">(token);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">}</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">console.</span><span style="color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">log</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">await</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> thread.output);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">await</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> thread.</span><span style="color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">close</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">();</span></span></code></pre>
<p>With no <code>apiUrl</code>, the SDK points at <code>http://localhost:2024</code> (the
default <code>langgraph dev</code> URL).</p>
<h2 id="whats-in-the-sdk">What's in the SDK</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Sub-client</th>
<th>Purpose</th>
<th>Docs</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>client.threads</code></td>
<td>Create threads, manage state, and <strong>stream</strong> runs.</td>
<td><a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/threads.md">Threads</a> · <a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/streaming.md">Streaming</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client.assistants</code></td>
<td>CRUD for assistants (schemas, graphs, versions).</td>
<td><a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/assistants.md">Assistants</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client.runs</code></td>
<td>Trigger / join / cancel runs without streaming.</td>
<td><a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/runs.md">Runs (legacy)</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client.crons</code></td>
<td>Schedule recurring runs.</td>
<td><a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/crons.md">Crons</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client.store</code></td>
<td>Namespaced KV + semantic store.</td>
<td><a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/store.md">Store</a></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3 id="streaming">Streaming</h3>
<p><code>client.threads.stream(...)</code> returns a <a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/streaming.md"><code>ThreadStream</code></a>
with typed, lazy projections for every aspect of a run:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>thread.messages</code> / <code>thread.toolCalls</code> — assembled chat output.</li>
<li><code>thread.values</code> / <code>thread.output</code> — graph state and final answer.</li>
<li><code>thread.interrupts</code> / <code>thread.interrupted</code> — human-in-the-loop.</li>
<li><code>thread.subgraphs</code> / <code>thread.subagents</code> — nested / deep-agent work.</li>
<li><code>thread.extensions.&#x3C;name></code> — typed custom server projections.</li>
<li><code>thread.audio</code> / <code>thread.images</code> / <code>thread.video</code> / <code>thread.files</code>
— media.</li>
</ul>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Deprecated.</strong> The generator-based streaming APIs on
<code>client.runs.*</code> (<code>stream</code>, <code>joinStream</code>) and <code>client.threads.joinStream</code>
are preserved for backwards compatibility only. New code should use
<code>client.threads.stream(...)</code>. See
<a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/runs.md">Runs (legacy)</a> for migration guidance.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3 id="transports">Transports</h3>
<p>Streaming defaults to Server-Sent Events (SSE) over HTTP. You can
switch to WebSocket per-call or globally, or plug in a custom
<code>AgentServerAdapter</code>:</p>
<pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="background-color:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e;color:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8" tabindex="0"><code><span class="line"><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">const</span><span style="color:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF"> thread</span><span style="color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> client.threads.</span><span style="color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">stream</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">({</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  assistantId: </span><span style="color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">"my-agent"</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  transport: </span><span style="color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">"websocket"</span><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">});</span></span></code></pre>
<p>See <a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/transports.md">Transports</a> for full details.</p>
<h2 id="framework-adapters">Framework adapters</h2>
<p>If you're building a UI, use the framework-specific packages that
wrap this SDK:</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-react/docs/README.md"><code>@langchain/langgraph-sdk/react</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-vue/docs/README.md"><code>@langchain/langgraph-sdk/vue</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-svelte/docs/README.md"><code>@langchain/langgraph-sdk/svelte</code></a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-angular/docs/README.md"><code>@langchain/langgraph-sdk/angular</code></a></li>
</ul>
<p>Use the SDK directly when you need low-level control, run it from a
non-browser environment (Node.js server, edge workers, scripts), or
integrate into a framework that does not yet have a first-party
adapter.</p>
<h2 id="architecture">Architecture</h2>
<p>The client code is organized into sub-client modules under
<code>src/client/</code>:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Path</th>
<th>Module</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>client/assistants/</code></td>
<td><code>AssistantsClient</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client/threads/</code></td>
<td><code>ThreadsClient</code> (includes the v2 <code>stream(...)</code> primitive)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client/runs/</code></td>
<td><code>RunsClient</code> (legacy streaming + CRUD)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client/crons/</code></td>
<td><code>CronsClient</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client/store/</code></td>
<td><code>StoreClient</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client/stream/</code></td>
<td><code>ThreadStream</code>, assemblers, transports</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client/base.ts</code></td>
<td><code>BaseClient</code>, shared config &#x26; helpers</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>client/index.ts</code></td>
<td>Main <code>Client</code> class &#x26; re-exports</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="change-log">Change log</h2>
<p>See <a href="https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/main/libs/sdk/CHANGELOG.md">CHANGELOG.md</a>.</p></div></div></section><section id="section-classes"><h2 class="flex items-center gap-2 "# @langchain/langgraph-sdk\n\n\u003e JavaScript/TypeScript package\n\n📖 [View in docs](https://reference.langchain.com/javascript/langchain-langgraph-sdk)\n\n# `@langchain/langgraph-sdk`\n\nThe JavaScript / TypeScript SDK for talking to a LangGraph API server.\nUse it to create and manage assistants, threads, runs, cron\nschedules, and the KV store — and, most importantly, to **stream**\ngraph executions in real time.\n\n📚 **[Full documentation](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/README.md)**\n\n## Install\n\n```bash\npnpm add @langchain/langgraph-sdk @langchain/core\n# or: npm install @langchain/langgraph-sdk @langchain/core\n# or: yarn add @langchain/langgraph-sdk @langchain/core\n```\n\n## Quick start\n\n```ts\nimport { Client } from \"@langchain/langgraph-sdk\";\n\nconst client = new Client({ apiUrl: \"http://localhost:2024\" });\n\n// Open a thread-centric stream (the recommended way to stream).\nconst thread = client.threads.stream({ assistantId: \"my-agent\" });\n\nawait thread.run.start({\n  input: { messages: [{ role: \"user\", content: \"hello\" }] },\n});\n\nfor await (const message of thread.messages) {\n  for await (const token of message.text) {\n    process.stdout.write(token);\n  }\n}\n\nconsole.log(await thread.output);\nawait thread.close();\n```\n\nWith no `apiUrl`, the SDK points at `http://localhost:2024` (the\ndefault `langgraph dev` URL).\n\n## What's in the SDK\n\n| Sub-client          | Purpose                                            | Docs                                                            |\n| ------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- |\n| `client.threads`    | Create threads, manage state, and **stream** runs. | [Threads](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/threads.md) · [Streaming](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/streaming.md) |\n| `client.assistants` | CRUD for assistants (schemas, graphs, versions).   | [Assistants](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/assistants.md)                              |\n| `client.runs`       | Trigger / join / cancel runs without streaming.    | [Runs (legacy)](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/runs.md)                                 |\n| `client.crons`      | Schedule recurring runs.                           | [Crons](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/crons.md)                                        |\n| `client.store`      | Namespaced KV + semantic store.                    | [Store](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/store.md)                                        |\n\n### Streaming\n\n`client.threads.stream(...)` returns a [`ThreadStream`](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/streaming.md)\nwith typed, lazy projections for every aspect of a run:\n\n- `thread.messages` / `thread.toolCalls` — assembled chat output.\n- `thread.values` / `thread.output` — graph state and final answer.\n- `thread.interrupts` / `thread.interrupted` — human-in-the-loop.\n- `thread.subgraphs` / `thread.subagents` — nested / deep-agent work.\n- `thread.extensions.\u003cname\u003e` — typed custom server projections.\n- `thread.audio` / `thread.images` / `thread.video` / `thread.files`\n  — media.\n\n\u003e **Deprecated.** The generator-based streaming APIs on\n\u003e `client.runs.*` (`stream`, `joinStream`) and `client.threads.joinStream`\n\u003e are preserved for backwards compatibility only. New code should use\n\u003e `client.threads.stream(...)`. See\n\u003e [Runs (legacy)](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/runs.md) for migration guidance.\n\n### Transports\n\nStreaming defaults to Server-Sent Events (SSE) over HTTP. You can\nswitch to WebSocket per-call or globally, or plug in a custom\n`AgentServerAdapter`:\n\n```ts\nconst thread = client.threads.stream({\n  assistantId: \"my-agent\",\n  transport: \"websocket\",\n});\n```\n\nSee [Transports](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/transports.md) for full details.\n\n## Framework adapters\n\nIf you're building a UI, use the framework-specific packages that\nwrap this SDK:\n\n- [`@langchain/langgraph-sdk/react`](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-react/docs/README.md)\n- [`@langchain/langgraph-sdk/vue`](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-vue/docs/README.md)\n- [`@langchain/langgraph-sdk/svelte`](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-svelte/docs/README.md)\n- [`@langchain/langgraph-sdk/angular`](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-angular/docs/README.md)\n\nUse the SDK directly when you need low-level control, run it from a\nnon-browser environment (Node.js server, edge workers, scripts), or\nintegrate into a framework that does not yet have a first-party\nadapter.\n\n## Architecture\n\nThe client code is organized into sub-client modules under\n`src/client/`:\n\n| Path                 | Module                                                    |\n| -------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |\n| `client/assistants/` | `AssistantsClient`                                        |\n| `client/threads/`    | `ThreadsClient` (includes the v2 `stream(...)` primitive) |\n| `client/runs/`       | `RunsClient` (legacy streaming + CRUD)                    |\n| `client/crons/`      | `CronsClient`                                             |\n| `client/store/`      | `StoreClient`                                             |\n| `client/stream/`     | `ThreadStream`, assemblers, transports                    |\n| `client/base.ts`     | `BaseClient`, shared config \u0026 helpers                     |\n| `client/index.ts`    | Main `Client` class \u0026 re-exports                          |\n\n## Change log\n\nSee [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/main/libs/sdk/CHANGELOG.md).\n\n## Classes\n\n- id=\"langchainlanggraph-sdk\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e@langchain/langgraph-sdk\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/h1\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eThe JavaScript / TypeScript SDK for talking to a LangGraph API server.\nUse it to create and manage assistants, threads, runs, cron\nschedules, and the KV store — and, most importantly, to \u003cstrong\u003estream\u003c/strong\u003e\ngraph executions in real time.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e📚 \u003cstrong\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/README.md\"\u003eFull documentation\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003ch2 id=\"install\"\u003eInstall\u003c/h2\u003e\n\u003cpre class=\"shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark\" style=\"background-color:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e;color:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8\" tabindex=\"0\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0\"\u003epnpm\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF\"\u003e add\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF\"\u003e @langchain/langgraph-sdk\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF\"\u003e @langchain/core\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D\"\u003e# or: npm install @langchain/langgraph-sdk @langchain/core\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D\"\u003e# or: yarn add @langchain/langgraph-sdk @langchain/core\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\n\u003ch2 id=\"quick-start\"\u003eQuick start\u003c/h2\u003e\n\u003cpre class=\"shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark\" style=\"background-color:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e;color:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8\" tabindex=\"0\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003eimport\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e { Client } \u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003efrom\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF\"\u003e \"@langchain/langgraph-sdk\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e;\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF\"\u003e client\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003e =\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003e new\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0\"\u003e Client\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e({ apiUrl: \u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF\"\u003e\"http://localhost:2024\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e });\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D\"\u003e// Open a thread-centric stream (the recommended way to stream).\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF\"\u003e thread\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003e =\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e client.threads.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0\"\u003estream\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e({ assistantId: \u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF\"\u003e\"my-agent\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e });\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003eawait\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e thread.run.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0\"\u003estart\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e({\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e  input: { messages: [{ role: \u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF\"\u003e\"user\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e, content: \u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF\"\u003e\"hello\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e }] },\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e});\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003e await\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e (\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF\"\u003e message\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003e of\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e thread.messages) {\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003e  for\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003e await\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e (\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF\"\u003e token\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003e of\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e message.text) {\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e    process.stdout.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0\"\u003ewrite\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e(token);\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e  }\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003econsole.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0\"\u003elog\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e(\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003eawait\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e thread.output);\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003eawait\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e thread.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0\"\u003eclose\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e();\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eWith no \u003ccode\u003eapiUrl\u003c/code\u003e, the SDK points at \u003ccode\u003ehttp://localhost:2024\u003c/code\u003e (the\ndefault \u003ccode\u003elanggraph dev\u003c/code\u003e URL).\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003ch2 id=\"whats-in-the-sdk\"\u003eWhat's in the SDK\u003c/h2\u003e\n\u003ctable\u003e\n\u003cthead\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eSub-client\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003ePurpose\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eDocs\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/thead\u003e\n\u003ctbody\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient.threads\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCreate threads, manage state, and \u003cstrong\u003estream\u003c/strong\u003e runs.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/threads.md\"\u003eThreads\u003c/a\u003e · \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/streaming.md\"\u003eStreaming\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient.assistants\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCRUD for assistants (schemas, graphs, versions).\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/assistants.md\"\u003eAssistants\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient.runs\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eTrigger / join / cancel runs without streaming.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/runs.md\"\u003eRuns (legacy)\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient.crons\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSchedule recurring runs.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/crons.md\"\u003eCrons\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient.store\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eNamespaced KV + semantic store.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/store.md\"\u003eStore\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/tbody\u003e\n\u003c/table\u003e\n\u003ch3 id=\"streaming\"\u003eStreaming\u003c/h3\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient.threads.stream(...)\u003c/code\u003e returns a \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/streaming.md\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eThreadStream\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\nwith typed, lazy projections for every aspect of a run:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ethread.messages\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ethread.toolCalls\u003c/code\u003e — assembled chat output.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ethread.values\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ethread.output\u003c/code\u003e — graph state and final answer.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ethread.interrupts\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ethread.interrupted\u003c/code\u003e — human-in-the-loop.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ethread.subgraphs\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ethread.subagents\u003c/code\u003e — nested / deep-agent work.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ethread.extensions.\u0026#x3C;name\u003e\u003c/code\u003e — typed custom server projections.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ccode\u003ethread.audio\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ethread.images\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ethread.video\u003c/code\u003e / \u003ccode\u003ethread.files\u003c/code\u003e\n— media.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cblockquote\u003e\n\u003cp\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDeprecated.\u003c/strong\u003e The generator-based streaming APIs on\n\u003ccode\u003eclient.runs.*\u003c/code\u003e (\u003ccode\u003estream\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003ejoinStream\u003c/code\u003e) and \u003ccode\u003eclient.threads.joinStream\u003c/code\u003e\nare preserved for backwards compatibility only. New code should use\n\u003ccode\u003eclient.threads.stream(...)\u003c/code\u003e. See\n\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/runs.md\"\u003eRuns (legacy)\u003c/a\u003e for migration guidance.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003ch3 id=\"transports\"\u003eTransports\u003c/h3\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eStreaming defaults to Server-Sent Events (SSE) over HTTP. You can\nswitch to WebSocket per-call or globally, or plug in a custom\n\u003ccode\u003eAgentServerAdapter\u003c/code\u003e:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cpre class=\"shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark\" style=\"background-color:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e;color:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8\" tabindex=\"0\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003econst\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF\"\u003e thread\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583\"\u003e =\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e client.threads.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0\"\u003estream\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e({\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e  assistantId: \u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF\"\u003e\"my-agent\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e,\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e  transport: \u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF\"\u003e\"websocket\"\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e,\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"line\"\u003e\u003cspan style=\"color:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8\"\u003e});\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eSee \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/transports.md\"\u003eTransports\u003c/a\u003e for full details.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003ch2 id=\"framework-adapters\"\u003eFramework adapters\u003c/h2\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eIf you're building a UI, use the framework-specific packages that\nwrap this SDK:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-react/docs/README.md\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e@langchain/langgraph-sdk/react\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-vue/docs/README.md\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e@langchain/langgraph-sdk/vue\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-svelte/docs/README.md\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e@langchain/langgraph-sdk/svelte\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-angular/docs/README.md\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e@langchain/langgraph-sdk/angular\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eUse the SDK directly when you need low-level control, run it from a\nnon-browser environment (Node.js server, edge workers, scripts), or\nintegrate into a framework that does not yet have a first-party\nadapter.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003ch2 id=\"architecture\"\u003eArchitecture\u003c/h2\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eThe client code is organized into sub-client modules under\n\u003ccode\u003esrc/client/\u003c/code\u003e:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003ctable\u003e\n\u003cthead\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003cth\u003ePath\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eModule\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/thead\u003e\n\u003ctbody\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient/assistants/\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eAssistantsClient\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient/threads/\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eThreadsClient\u003c/code\u003e (includes the v2 \u003ccode\u003estream(...)\u003c/code\u003e primitive)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient/runs/\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eRunsClient\u003c/code\u003e (legacy streaming + CRUD)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient/crons/\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eCronsClient\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient/store/\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eStoreClient\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient/stream/\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eThreadStream\u003c/code\u003e, assemblers, transports\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient/base.ts\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eBaseClient\u003c/code\u003e, shared config \u0026#x26; helpers\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003ccode\u003eclient/index.ts\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eMain \u003ccode\u003eClient\u003c/code\u003e class \u0026#x26; re-exports\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/tbody\u003e\n\u003c/table\u003e\n\u003ch2 id=\"change-log\"\u003eChange log\u003c/h2\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eSee \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/main/libs/sdk/CHANGELOG.md\"\u003eCHANGELOG.md\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"20b:T18ef,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"# `@langchain/langgraph-sdk`\n\nThe JavaScript / TypeScript SDK for talking to a LangGraph API server.\nUse it to create and manage assistants, threads, runs, cron\nschedules, and the KV store — and, most importantly, to **stream**\ngraph executions in real time.\n\n📚 **[Full documentation](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/README.md)**\n\n## Install\n\n```bash\npnpm add @langchain/langgraph-sdk @langchain/core\n# or: npm install @langchain/langgraph-sdk @langchain/core\n# or: yarn add @langchain/langgraph-sdk @langchain/core\n```\n\n## Quick start\n\n```ts\nimport { Client } from \"@langchain/langgraph-sdk\";\n\nconst client = new Client({ apiUrl: \"http://localhost:2024\" });\n\n// Open a thread-centric stream (the recommended way to stream).\nconst thread = client.threads.stream({ assistantId: \"my-agent\" });\n\nawait thread.run.start({\n  input: { messages: [{ role: \"user\", content: \"hello\" }] },\n});\n\nfor await (const message of thread.messages) {\n  for await (const token of message.text) {\n    process.stdout.write(token);\n  }\n}\n\nconsole.log(await thread.output);\nawait thread.close();\n```\n\nWith no `apiUrl`, the SDK points at `http://localhost:2024` (the\ndefault `langgraph dev` URL).\n\n## What's in the SDK\n\n| Sub-client          | Purpose                                            | Docs                                                            |\n| ------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- |\n| `client.threads`    | Create threads, manage state, and **stream** runs. | [Threads](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/threads.md) · [Streaming](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/streaming.md) |\n| `client.assistants` | CRUD for assistants (schemas, graphs, versions).   | [Assistants](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/assistants.md)                              |\n| `client.runs`       | Trigger / join / cancel runs without streaming.    | [Runs (legacy)](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/runs.md)                                 |\n| `client.crons`      | Schedule recurring runs.                           | [Crons](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/crons.md)                                        |\n| `client.store`      | Namespaced KV + semantic store.                    | [Store](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/store.md)                                        |\n\n### Streaming\n\n`client.threads.stream(...)` returns a [`ThreadStream`](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/streaming.md)\nwith typed, lazy projections for every aspect of a run:\n\n- `thread.messages` / `thread.toolCalls` — assembled chat output.\n- `thread.values` / `thread.output` — graph state and final answer.\n- `thread.interrupts` / `thread.interrupted` — human-in-the-loop.\n- `thread.subgraphs` / `thread.subagents` — nested / deep-agent work.\n- `thread.extensions.\u003cname\u003e` — typed custom server projections.\n- `thread.audio` / `thread.images` / `thread.video` / `thread.files`\n  — media.\n\n\u003e **Deprecated.** The generator-based streaming APIs on\n\u003e `client.runs.*` (`stream`, `joinStream`) and `client.threads.joinStream`\n\u003e are preserved for backwards compatibility only. New code should use\n\u003e `client.threads.stream(...)`. See\n\u003e [Runs (legacy)](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/runs.md) for migration guidance.\n\n### Transports\n\nStreaming defaults to Server-Sent Events (SSE) over HTTP. You can\nswitch to WebSocket per-call or globally, or plug in a custom\n`AgentServerAdapter`:\n\n```ts\nconst thread = client.threads.stream({\n  assistantId: \"my-agent\",\n  transport: \"websocket\",\n});\n```\n\nSee [Transports](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/docs/transports.md) for full details.\n\n## Framework adapters\n\nIf you're building a UI, use the framework-specific packages that\nwrap this SDK:\n\n- [`@langchain/langgraph-sdk/react`](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-react/docs/README.md)\n- [`@langchain/langgraph-sdk/vue`](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-vue/docs/README.md)\n- [`@langchain/langgraph-sdk/svelte`](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-svelte/docs/README.md)\n- [`@langchain/langgraph-sdk/angular`](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/03a0d8b8632082e6dbf4a96fcf37f8f67151b74f/libs/sdk/../sdk-angular/docs/README.md)\n\nUse the SDK directly when you need low-level control, run it from a\nnon-browser environment (Node.js server, edge workers, scripts), or\nintegrate into a framework that does not yet have a first-party\nadapter.\n\n## Architecture\n\nThe client code is organized into sub-client modules under\n`src/client/`:\n\n| Path                 | Module                                                    |\n| -------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |\n| `client/assistants/` | `AssistantsClient`                                        |\n| `client/threads/`    | `ThreadsClient` (includes the v2 `stream(...)` primitive) |\n| `client/runs/`       | `RunsClient` (legacy streaming + CRUD)                    |\n| `client/crons/`      | `CronsClient`                                             |\n| `client/store/`      | `StoreClient`                                             |\n| `client/stream/`     | `ThreadStream`, assemblers, transports                    |\n| `client/base.ts`     | `BaseClient`, shared config \u0026 helpers                     |\n| `client/index.ts`    | Main `Client` class \u0026 re-exports                          |\n\n## Change log\n\nSee [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraphjs/blob/main/libs/sdk/CHANGELOG.md)."])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"24:[\"$\",\"$L209\",null,{\"html\":\"$20a\",\"rawContent\":\"$20b\",\"className\":\"\",\"compact\":false}]\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"208:[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"max-w-8xl
